visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a brightly lit supermarket aisle. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a brown off-the-shoulder top, stands in front of a glass-door freezer. She holds a large black and orange product box featuring a mountain of ribs. Bright red and white text overlays are at the top and bottom. (2) The scene shifts to an indoor kitchen. The woman holds a ceramic bowl filled with large, greyish-brown cooked pork bones. She points at the bones with her right hand while speaking directly to the camera. The background shows a kitchen counter and a doorway. (3) A close-up shot shows a small blue bowl pouring a chunky green and red chili sauce over the stack of pork bones. The sauce coats the meat surfaces. (4) Two women sit at a dining table at home. They are both wearing similar brown off-the-shoulder tops; the one on the right wears a grey bucket hat. They are holding pieces of ribs and eating them with enthusiastic facial expressions. (5) Various variety-style text overlays in yellow and pink appear around the women as they continue eating and gesturing towards the product box on the table. The background includes a living room area with toys and a sofa.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 十月推薦. [Slogan]: 泰式火山排骨. [Slogan]: 超便宜好吃嗎?. (2) [Subtitle]: 泰式火山排骨. [Variety]: 泰泰泰泰. (3) [Subtitle]: 我最喜歡吃泰菜. (4) [Subtitle]: 而且它是標榜火山哎. (5) [Subtitle]: 469元1700公克. (6) [Subtitle]: 它可以用微波. (7) [Variety]: 火山就出來了. (8) [Variety]: 超級無敵好喝. (9) [Variety]: 美味至極. (10) [Slogan]: 你要自己剁.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appear together in the latter half of the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The first woman has long black hair and wears a brown ruffled off-shoulder top. The second woman wears a similar top and a grey bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts in a Costco warehouse with industrial freezer units. It then moves to a residential kitchen with standard appliances and a living room with domestic furniture and toys.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks with high pitch and rapid pace, conveying excitement. Background music is a high-tempo electronic pop track with a heavy kick drum. (2) A sharp 'Ding' SFX triggers a transition. The speaker's volume increases as she emphasizes specific words. (3) Sound of liquid splashing and pouring is clearly audible over the music. A second female voice enters the mix, laughing. (4) A 'Pop' cartoon sound effect accompanies a punchline. Both female voices interact with overlapping speech and high emotional arousal. (5) A 'Sparkle' chime effect occurs at the end, followed by the music fading out quickly during the final enthusiastic exclamation.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Presentation -> Tasting -> Final Review
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional food review for a specific product found at Costco. It uses a high-energy, vlog-style approach to showcase the value and taste of 'Thai Volcano Pork Bones', combining supermarket discovery with a home-cooking and tasting experience to engage viewers interested in food trends and budget-friendly meals.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creators explicitly show the product box, mention the price, and provide a positive review of the taste and convenience.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes heavy variety-show style editing (captions and SFX) to maintain a fast pace and high engagement level typical of short-form social media content.
